title: gbrain #380: put --file should be real and unknown op flags should fail early
summary: For gbrain issue 380 / PR 829, gbrain put now supports file <path by reading markdown content into the existing put page content param before connecting to the DB. Shared operation CLI parsing now rejects unknown flags b
body:
For gbrain issue #380 / PR #829, gbrain put now supports --file <path> by reading markdown content into the existing put_page content param before connecting to the DB. Shared operation CLI parsing now rejects unknown flags before engine connection, preventing intuitive-but-wrong flags from silently falling through and causing empty or misleading writes.
Evidence: Fixed in PR #829 for issue #380. Changed src/cli.ts and test/cli.test.ts. Regression covers put --help showing --file, unknown shared-op flags failing before DB connection, and an end-to-end isolated PGLite init + put --file + get round trip.
Verified by: bun test test/cli.test.ts; bun run typecheck; git diff --check
